title: rubus pygmaeopsis
intro: Rubus pygmaeopsis, also known as the dwarf raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus pygmaeopsis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Herbal preparations of Rubus pygmaeopsis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
